metadata.description: Author an agentic capability once in Claude Code's plugin format and ship it to every major harness.

plugins.name: changelog
plugins.description: Generate and maintain a Keep a Changelog–style CHANGELOG.md from git history.

plugins.name: pr-description
plugins.description: Draft a clear, reviewer-friendly pull request description from the staged diff and commit history.

plugins.name: test-plan
plugins.description: Produce a focused test plan for a change — what to test, at which level, and the edge cases worth covering.

plugins.name: secret-scan
plugins.description: Scan a diff or files for committed secrets and walk through safe remediation.

plugins.name: shell-lint
plugins.description: Lint and harden shell scripts with shellcheck and robust-bash conventions.
